# DailyCharter mail engine (Cloudflare Worker + D1)

The whole cloud: hourly send cron + quiz API. Free tier covers thousands of subscribers.

## Deploy
    npm i -g wrangler && wrangler login
    wrangler d1 create dailycharter          # paste the id into wrangler.toml
    wrangler d1 execute dailycharter --file=schema.sql
    # seed the plans generated by pill-factory:
    #   python seed_plan.py plans/plan-*.json  → seed-L1-*.sql
    wrangler d1 execute dailycharter --file=seed-L1-180.sql   # etc.
    wrangler secret put TOKEN_SECRET
    wrangler secret put ESP_API_KEY
    wrangler deploy

## Wire the front
- Signup form → POST {WORKER_URL}/api/subscribe {email, first_name, plan_days}
- quiz.html   → set API_BASE = WORKER_URL (it calls /api/question, /api/attempts, /api/review-next)
- Emails link to {SITE_URL}/quiz.html?pill=…&u=token&a=X

## Test locally
    wrangler dev --test-scheduled
    curl "http://localhost:8787/__scheduled?cron=0+*+*+*+*"    # fire the cron
    curl -X POST http://localhost:8787/api/subscribe -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
         -d '{"email":"you@test.com","first_name":"Ana","plan_days":180}'

## Invariants the code enforces
- GET never writes (quiz answers, unsubscribe → confirm page + POST)
- Pointer advances only after a confirmed ESP send; failures retry next run
- correct_key never leaves the server before an attempt is recorded
- Send log + attempt log are idempotent (double-taps and reruns are harmless)
